name: AddSearch
description: AddSearch — Hosted site search API with a crawler, relevance tuning, and analytics for websites and docs.

seo.title: AddSearch — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: AddSearch: AddSearch — Hosted site search API with a crawler, relevance tuning, and analytics for websites and docs.

when_to_use: Hosted search with relevance tuning for docs site
Autocomplete + faceted search for knowledge base
Search analytics to identify documentation gaps
Multi-language site search with language detection

pros: Managed crawler removes infrastructure and reindex maintenance
Relevance tuning UI lets non-devs boost and pin results
Usable analytics for zero-result queries and click data
Fast drop-in JS widget with sensible defaults
cons: Pricing climbs quickly past the free crawl document cap
Less powerful than Algolia for complex faceted UIs
Crawler-based indexing lags behind push-based APIs
Limited control over underlying ranking internals
review.verdict: Solid hosted search for marketing sites and docs when you want zero ops, but outgrown by large e-commerce catalogs.
review.best_for: Content sites, documentation, and small e-commerce needing site search without running infra.
review.not_for: Teams needing push-indexing, custom ranking models, or sub-10ms global latency at scale.

lock_in.reason: Index and relevance tuning proprietary; reindexing required to switch

developer_experience.reason: JS SDK, REST API; simpler than Algolia
